title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, create, and run large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; provides chat, generate, pull, and embedding endpoints with promises.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that plugs Ollama models into LangChain as LLM, chat, and embedding components with one-line instantiation.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) that connects to any local Ollama instance; supports multi-model chats, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, and embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby methods for chat, completion, and model operations.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with history, syntax highlighting, and conversation management for local Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension powered by local Ollama models for inline code completion and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart that deploys Ollama server and models onto Kubernetes clusters with GPU and persistent-volume support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) published to Docker Hub; one-liner to run Llama 3, Mistral, etc. locally.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that exposes Ollama models as generators and embedders for building RAG pipelines in Python.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Streamlit app demonstrating retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean Next.js chat interface that consumes the Ollama REST API; supports multiple models and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantized GGUFs ready to import into Ollama with one command.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate providing strongly-typed async/await wrappers for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK for .NET 6+; chat, generate, and pull models via HttpClient with async enumerable streams.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and conversation threads.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake adding the Ollama server and utility packages to nixpkgs for reproducible deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end example notebook showing how to combine Ollama embeddings, LangChain, and Chroma for private Q&A over documents.
